message:
feat(snapshot): expand tool ecosystem detection + metrics (bd-2gkx.5)

Add ToolEcosystemSummary and DetectedToolSummary types to snapshot.
Integrate detectAllCLIs() into tool health snapshot collection to track
all agents and tools from the ACFS manifest. Emit per-tool installed and
detection latency metrics for the full ecosystem.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
